description:
As a registered SauceDemo user
  I want to log in, add products to my cart, complete a purchase and log out
  So that I can verify the full end-to-end shopping flow works correctly

elements.name: User can log in successfully with test data "TC_SMOKE_VALID_001"

steps.name: the SauceDemo login page is displayed
I load test data from sheet "E2E_Tests" with id "TC_SMOKE_VALID_001"
I log in with username "$username" and password "$password"
I should see the product inventory page
I log out of the application

elements.name: User sees error with invalid credentials from test data "TC_SMOKE_INVALID_001"

steps.name: the SauceDemo login page is displayed
I load test data from sheet "E2E_Tests" with id "TC_SMOKE_INVALID_001"
I log in with username "$username" and password "$password"
I should see an error message on the login page

elements.name: Cart badge updates correctly with test data "TC_SANITY_CART_001"

steps.name: the SauceDemo login page is displayed
I load test data from sheet "E2E_Tests" with id "TC_SANITY_CART_001"
I log in with username "$username" and password "$password"
I should see the product inventory page
I add the product "$productName" to the cart
the cart badge should show 1 item
I log out of the application

name: SauceDemo E2E Purchase Journey
